label: Identity
intro: Core identity records you will commonly reference during relocation and first-month setup.

label: Employment
intro: Work-related records that help with onboarding, payroll context, and relocation coordination.

label: Housing
intro: Address and rental records often needed for practical settlement steps.

label: Travel
intro: Travel and relocation proof documents that support timeline and logistics continuity.
